reasoning: The Wikipedia page for FIDE rankings mathematically specifies Gukesh's rating on 2025-11-23 as 2763 (from the 1 November FIDE list). To resolve YES, his rating must be at least 1% higher on the forecast dates, which equates to an official updated FIDE rating of at least 2790.63 (effectively 2791). For 2025-11-30, Wikipedia will virtually guarantee to still show the November 1 rating of 2763, since FIDE lists update on the 1st of each month (Dec 1 will not be live ahead of time). For later dates, gaining 28 Elo points at the elite 2750+ level requires an extraordinarily rare, dominant string of tournament performances. Considering he has been heavily shedding rating points throughout 2025 (dropping from a peak of 2794 in October 2024 to 2763 currently) and the short time horizon remaining (max ~3 months of rated classical games before Feb 2026 lists), reaching 2791 is remarkably unlikely. Probabilities are kept very low, slowly grading up over time due to uncertainty.
